steps.title: Identify the key contrast
steps.content: The passage uses “But” to signal a contrast: the Highwaymen share compositional structures and subjects, but individuals introduced variations within that framework.

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
The statement "It describes an aesthetic framework shared by a particular group of artists and then makes and illustrates the claim that individuals introduced variations within that framework" correctly describes the two-part structure: a shared aesthetic framework, then the claim—illustrated through Calvin Brooks—that individuals introduced variations within it.

The other three either mischaracterize the tone as reinforcing unoriginality, invent historical context and multiple explorations not in the text, or focus on collaboration and influence rather than individuation.

That matches answer A — A is correct.
